instruction: clean the countertop and stovetop with a cloth

segments.subtask: wipe the wooden countertop with a yellow cloth
wipe the dining table with a yellow cloth
pick up the round brown placemat from the table and clean under it
wipe the wooden dinning table with a yellow cloth
pick up the round brown placemats from the wooden table and move to the right
wipe the wooden countertop with a yellow cloth
move the round brown placemats closer to you and place it exactly to the left of the other one on the table
wipe the wooden kitchen table with a yellow cloth
wipe the black glass stovetop with a yellow cloth
